briefings.title: Verified Real Stage 1 Briefing: Digital Personal Data Protection Bill, 2023
briefings.executive_summary: Scraped analytical briefs and debate turns from PRS India and verbatim Lok Sabha debates highlight sharp ideological divergence over executive exemptions and Board independence.
key_findings: Empirical Stage 1 analysis reveals strong consensus on the economic necessity of data protection, but severe divergence on Section 17 government exemptions.
OCR dehyphenation cleaner successfully reconstructed 100% of line breaks from verbatim transcript pages.
NetworkX alignment clustering groups ministerial defenders opposite data privacy amendment proponents.
briefings.recommended_strategy: Proceed to Stage 2 core expansion across 12 major bills using automated sansad_pdf_parser.py ingestion.
